title: Dashboard git commit endpoint trusts arbitrary pathspecs and ignores git add failure
description: POST /api/git/commit passes API-provided files directly to git add and proceeds to git commit without checking the git add exit code. A direct caller can submit broad or option-like pathspecs, and failures are hidden until commit. Affected: src/dashboard/server.ts. Fix by allowing only files from git status, passing -- before pathspecs, and failing if git add exits non-zero.
